name: The Conjuring Chamber
description:
This large room is dominated by a whirlpool.  There are two exits.  To
the east you can see a door and to the west you can see a waterfilled
hallway stretching off.  The whirlpool is threatening to pull you down,
but you are certain that you would drown in it.

exits.description:
There is a strange store that seems suspiciously out of place just to
the north.

A door blocks your way, unless it is open in which case it doesn't block
your way.
A hallway begins to move to the east.
The whirlpool is threatening to pull you down to your death.

extra_descriptions.description: This just looks scary and EXTREMELY dangerous.
This is a big door, but not as big as it looked from the other side.
